message:
🐛 Fix corrupted MSW mock handlers for BAA, HIPAA, and GxP (#9703)

The previous merge conflict resolution left handlers.ts with:
- BAA summary handler missing closing braces (HttpResponse.json unclosed)
- HIPAA summary handler missing closing braces
- BAA mocks placed before HIPAA/GxP (inside broken scope)

This fix:
- Removes the corrupt first BAA mock block (lines 744-770)
- Adds proper closing for HIPAA summary handler
- Places clean BAA mocks after GxP section

Fixes the TypeScript build failure on console.kubestellar.io demo.
Closes #9645

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
